params.secretHash: Hash of the secret used for claiming on L2
params.to: The recipient's Aztec address on L2

params.amount: The amount of tokens to deposit
params.secretHash: Hash of the secret used for claiming privately on L2
params.token: The ERC-20 token address on L1

params.amount: The amount of tokens to deposit
params.secretHash: Hash of the secret used for claiming on L2
params.to: The recipient's Aztec address on L2
params.token: The ERC-20 token address on L1

params._l2Bridge: The L2 CelariTokenBridge contract address on Aztec
params._registry: The Aztec Registry contract on L1
params._weth: The WETH contract address on this L1 chain

params.amount: The amount of tokens to withdraw
params.blockNumber: The L2 block number where the withdrawal was initiated
params.leafIndex: The leaf index in the outbox merkle tree
params.recipient: The L1 address to receive the tokens
params.token: The ERC-20 token address on L1
params.withCaller: If true, the caller must match callerOnL1 in the message

addSupportedToken(address).notice: Add a token to the supported list.

depositETHToAztecPublic(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Deposit ETH to Aztec L2 by wrapping to WETH first.

depositToAztecPrivate(address,uint256,by.notice: Deposit ERC-20 tokens to Aztec L2 (private/shielded balance).

depositToAztecPublic(address,bytes32,uin.notice: Deposit ERC-20 tokens to Aztec L2 (public balance).

getDepositContentHash(address,uint256,by.notice: Get the deposit content hash for verification.

getLockedBalance(address).notice: Get the locked balance of a token in the portal.

getWithdrawContentHash(address,uint256,a.notice: Get the withdrawal content hash for verification.

initialize(address,bytes32,address).notice: Initialize the portal with Aztec registry and L2 bridge address.

removeSupportedToken(address).notice: Remove a token from the supported list.

withdraw(address,address,uint256,bool,ui.notice: Withdraw tokens from Aztec L2 back to L1.         Consumes the L2→L1 message from the Outbox.
